name: Amigo Cash
description_short: AmigoCash provides car title loans across 20+ states, allowing borrowers to access cash using vehicle equity while keeping their car. Approval in minutes with no credit check required.
description_long: AmigoCash is a car title loan company operating in more than twenty states nationwide. The company positions itself as one of America's most respected providers helping working Americans access cash using their vehicle's equity. Their stated mission is to provide convenient, hassle-free access to funds with straightforward, transparent terms and excellent customer service. AmigoCash specializes exclusively in auto title loans—a collateral-based lending product where borrowers pledge their vehicle title to secure the loan while retaining use of the vehicle. The company operates physical branch locations in addition to an online application platform, with bilingual Spanish-language support. Their marketing emphasizes speed (funds in 29 minutes), accessibility (everyone qualifies, no credit background required), and competitive rates (they claim to find "the cheapest" rate from different lenders). The application process is entirely online and requires basic vehicle information (year, make, model, series, style) and personal details (name, phone, zip code, email). The company promises quick approval decisions delivered within minutes via email confirmation. AmigoCash distinguishes itself through its multi-state operation, fast funding timeline, and explicit "no credit check" positioning. However, the company's website provides no detailed fee schedule, APR disclosure, repayment terms, or specific loan amounts available—critical information typically required for transparent lending. The actual cost of borrowing and loan terms remain opaque on their public-facing materials. As a title loan lender, AmigoCash operates in a high-risk lending category where borrowers face potential vehicle repossession if unable to repay, and the true cost of capital may be substantially higher than traditional personal loans or alternatives.
address: 8100 Camp Bowie W Blvd, Fort Worth, TX 76116

company_info.headquarters: 8100 Camp Bowie W Blvd, Fort Worth, TX 76116

pros: Fast funding timeline—claims money deposited in 29 minutes after approval
No credit check required—applicants approved regardless of credit history or score
Quick approval decisions—loan decision provided within minutes of application
Keep your car—borrower retains vehicle use while using title as collateral
Online application process—simple, secure, and confidential digital application
Multi-state availability—operates in 20+ states with multiple physical branch locations
Bilingual support—customer service available in English and Spanish
cons: No transparent fee schedule—website lacks APR, interest rate, and fee disclosures
Collateral-based risk—vehicle repossession is possible if loan defaults
Predatory lending category—title loans typically carry very high costs of capital, often 100%+ APR
No loan amount details—maximum and minimum loan amounts not disclosed on website
Limited repayment information—terms, payment schedules, and payoff options not explained online
best_for: Vehicle owners with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Borrowers needing emergency cash within hours and willing to accept high-cost financing
Individuals with significant vehicle equity seeking fast liquidity without lengthy underwriting
diagnosis: AmigoCash is best for vehicle owners with damaged credit who need emergency cash quickly and can afford high-cost borrowing. Critical caveat: This is a title loan product carrying extremely high interest rates and genuine risk of vehicle loss—borrowers should explore all alternatives before proceeding, as the true cost of capital is typically 100-200%+ APR or higher, and the company's website deliberately obscures pricing details.
services: Car title loans with vehicle as collateral
